subcodes.first_line: It behoveth every nation to heed My call, turn towards My horizon, and direct itself toward the court of My loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینبغی لکل امه اجابت ندائی و اقبلت الی افقی و توجهت الی شطر عنایتی بان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @love of God
